_comment: SYNTHETIC TEST ARTIFACT (spec §11.3) — mimics the GDELT DOC 2.0 artlist JSON shape for normalize() tests; values are invented (example.com domains) and never enter data/. Per-article fields were NOT live-confirmed at the 2026-07-18 sweep (endpoint IP-throttled from this egress; the one live build-time attempt on 2026-07-18 also returned the throttle 429 — see gdelt_throttle_429.txt). Shape follows GDELT documentation; edge cases below exercise the defensive parser: missing title, missing/garbled seendate, missing sourcecountry, missing url (dropped), duplicate url (deduped).

articles.title: Tanker transit delayed near Strait of Hormuz
Ölpreis steigt nach Ankündigung von Förderkürzungen
Article with no url — must be dropped, not imputed
Duplicate URL syndication copy — deduped keep-first
